veterinary.detail: After being placed in the starting gates kicked out behind, resulted in both hind legs becoming cast over the starting gate. Withdrawn from racing.
Fractious in the Parade Ring, reared and fell over. Withdrawn from racing.
Lame left fore. Withdrawn from racing.
Bled from both nostrils after racing.
Whilst leaving the Parade Ring slipped over. Withdrawn from racing.
Substantial blood in trachea noted on post-race scoping.
Substantial blood in trachea noted on post-race scoping.
Bled from left nostril after barrier trial.
Unacceptable performance and lame right front leg after racing.
